summary: Grignard Reaction and Regitz Diazo Transfer anti-greed guards, adding isocyanide penalty 0.45 to both. Motivated by 3g-4 residual greed migration — Passerini_1126 top1 had shifted to Grignard, Passerini_1127 top1 to Regitz. 3g-5 demotes these correctly but NO HIT GAIN because real Passerini is not in top5 of those cases. Zero-ROI outcome signals Phase 3g guard-tuning has exhausted its reach for MCR cases; Phase 3f (hand-curated DB seed rows for MCR variants) is the next frontier.

change_lines.grignard_anti_greed: elif fam == 'grignard reaction' or startswith('grignard reaction') — penalize isocyanide 0.45
change_lines.regitz_anti_greed: elif fam == 'regitz diazo transfer' or startswith('regitz diazo transfer') — penalize isocyanide 0.45

strict_non_regression_status: PASS — all 9 metrics == 3g-4 baseline; 0 improved, 9 unchanged, 0 regressed
diagnostic_journey: Probe 3g-4 residual MCR misses: Passerini_1126 top1=Grignard, Passerini_1127 top1=Regitz Diazo Transfer; Ugi_1345 top1=Aldol Reaction (already penalized 0.50 — moved rank 2→1 after Benzoin demotion).
DB probe probe_3g_5_rows.py: Grignard 3 rows iso=0, Regitz 4 rows iso=0, Aldol 12 rows iso=0 — all candidates safe for iso-penalty.
Patched evidence_search.py with two new elif blocks. Smoke test smoke_3g_5.py (9 checks) PASS.

Post-benchmark check_targets_5.py: penalty FIRES correctly — Grignard demoted from Passerini_1126 top1 (Aldol moves to top1); Regitz demoted from Passerini_1127 top1 (Lieben Haloform moves to top1). But Passerini itself is not in top5 of either case, so demotion alone produces zero hit gain.

This is the ROI-drop signal: per-family anti-greed has exhausted its reach for MCR cases. Remaining misses need Passerini/Ugi/Petasis to BOOST (not just competitors to demote). Next lever is seed-DB expansion = Phase 3f.

roi_analysis.next_step: Transition to Phase 3f: hand-curated DB seed SMILES for Passerini/Ugi/Petasis-Mannich MCR variants so the own-family score can out-compete demoted greedy families. Per user directive '3g 계속, 3g ROI 하락하면 3f 진입'.

shipping_decision: KEEP 3g-5 patch despite zero gain — guards are strictly non-regressive and provide defensive anti-greed for future DB rows that may contain MCR-like SMILES mis-labeled as Grignard/Regitz. Cost is 6 lines of code; benefit is robustness.
smoke_tests: smoke_3g_5.py — 9 PASS / 0 FAIL covering Grignard clean, Passerini/Ugi→Grignard penalty, Regitz clean, Passerini/Ugi→Regitz penalty, Mannich/Friedel-Crafts not affected, Grignard startswith variant
probe_3g_5_rows.py — all 19 own-family DB rows (Grignard 3 + Regitz 4 + Aldol 12) verified iso=0 clean
